g.text: ? · help — keys, the amc grammar, series, uxn
— a granular grinder. Load a source, shape the grain, press Run.
1. Ctrl+1, type a path / YouTube URL / "artist - track", press Enter.
2. Ctrl+R. That's a grind. Everything below is shaping.
The line above the bar is the live recipe: exactly what Run will render, in the same grammar
the command line takes. Type a recipe to apply it — the panels move to match. ↑/↓ = history.
rw|q|poly|lib mixer: random-window · quantized grid · polyrhythmic · library/clusters
<ms> | /N | *N grain length; /2 /3 *2 transform the CURRENT value (beat-relative)
band is a real band-pass FILTER and costs ~27x a raw grind. "c raw" (the default) is the
